name: agent-ci
description: Run GitHub Actions locally with pause-on-failure and retry loops built for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Run GitHub Actions locally, pause on failure, and retry only the broken step
interface.longDescription: Use Agent CI to run a repo's GitHub Actions on your machine with the official runner, keep the failed container alive, and let an agent fix and retry without pushing.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent CI to run this repo's GitHub Actions locally, pause on failure, and help fix then retry any broken step.
